blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 51°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
